next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Excisional biopsy of a peripheral lymph node (if present) or lung biopsy
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D levels
18F-FDG PET/CT to identify optimal biopsy sites and extent of disease
Cardiac MRI to assess for myocardial involvement
Evaluation for Bartonella henselae via serology and PCR
